metadata.title: BimDossier
metadata.defaultTitle: BimDossier — the Wkb dossier platform for Dutch contractors
metadata.description: The model-native Wkb dossier platform for Dutch contractors, built for the Wet kwaliteitsborging voor het bouwen. Snags pinned in 3D, deadlines that track themselves, a dossier ready for gereedmelding. EU-hosted.

hero.badge: Private pilot · limited spots for Dutch aannemers
hero.headline: The Wkb dossier platform, built on your model.
hero.subtitle: The dedicated platform for the Wet kwaliteitsborging voor het bouwen. Pin every finding on your 3D BIM model — or straight onto a PDF floor plan when that's all you have. Deadlines track themselves from bouwmelding to gereedmelding, and your dossier stays ready for the kwaliteitsborger and bevoegd gezag — not scattered across folders and spreadsheets.
hero.trust: In private pilot with Dutch aannemers · EU-hosted, DPA included · Works alongside any kwaliteitsborger and instrument

features.headline: Your whole Wkb dossier, built on your model
features.subtitle: From bouwmelding to gereedmelding, your entire Wkb dossier runs in one place: snags in 3D, certificates tracked, deadlines computed, filed on time.

featureDetail.imagesNote: More screenshots and short videos coming soon.

roadmap.headline: What we're building next
roadmap.subtitle: Already in design or in progress — not available yet.

comments.title: Finding discussions
comments.body: Comment threads on each finding so your team and kwaliteitsborger can resolve issues in context.

handover.title: Consumentendossier & oplevering
handover.body: Client handover sign-off and proces-verbaal, separate from the dossier bevoegd gezag.

ai.title: AI dossier assistant
ai.body: Ask questions across your documents and drawings. Self-hosted and privacy-first — your data never leaves our EU infrastructure.

push.title: Mobile push reminders
push.body: Deadline and finding alerts pushed straight to your phone.

howItWorks.headline: From project start to gereedmelding in four steps

step1.title: Create your project
step1.body: Enter the address with Dutch autocomplete, select building type and gevolgklasse, set planned dates. Deadlines are computed automatically.

step2.title: Upload documents
step2.body: Drawings, certificates, KB documents — upload everything in one place. The dossier checklist shows what is still missing.

step3.title: Track findings
step3.body: Log inspection findings, assign resolution to your team, upload evidence photos. Full lifecycle from open to verified.

step4.title: File on time
step4.body: Email reminders before every deadline. Download the complete dossier package for gereedmelding filing at the Omgevingsloket.

cta.headline: Stop chasing documents. File a dossier that holds up.
cta.subtitle: Run your entire Wkb dossier on the platform built for it. Join the private pilot and walk into your next gereedmelding already done.

blog.headline: Insights & updates
blog.subtitle: Wkb compliance, Dutch building regulations, and product updates — from the team building the model-native dossier.
blog.empty: No posts yet. Check back soon.

contactPage.headline: Let's find the right plan for your team
contactPage.subtitle: We'll walk you through BimDossier, answer your questions, and help you choose the plan that fits your projects.
contactPage.bookCallDescription: Schedule a 30-minute demo with our team. We'll show you the platform and discuss pricing tailored to your situation.

intro.subtitle: We're opening a limited pilot to a small group of Dutch contractors. Tell us about your team — if it's a fit, we'll be in touch.

errors.pendingDuplicate: We've already received your request. Give us a day to review — we'll email you.
errors.alreadyApproved: Your BimDossier account is already set up. Check your email for the activation link, or contact support if you didn't receive one.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests from your network — please try again in an hour.
errors.unreachable: We couldn't reach the BimDossier API. Please try again in a moment.

snagShowcase.headline: Catch defects before they cost you.
snagShowcase.subtitle: Drag to rotate the model. Snags are flagged right on it as inspectors find and fix them.
snagShowcase.hintWatch: Each pin flags a real Wkb snag
snagShowcase.learnMoreBlog: Learn how Wkb borging works on the blog
snagShowcase.fallbackBody: Your browser cannot show the live 3D model, but here are the snags it carries:
snagShowcase.fallbackAlt: Interactive 3D building model with quality-assurance snags

trust.headline: Built for a regulated pilot — and honest about it
trust.subtitle: Your dossier is legally load-bearing. Here is exactly who is behind the platform, where your data lives, and where it stops.

hosting.title: EU-hosted, DPA included
hosting.body: Your data runs on EU infrastructure and never leaves it. We sign a verwerkersovereenkomst (DPA) with every pilot partner.

instrument.title: Works alongside your kwaliteitsborger
instrument.body: BimDossier is not an approved Wkb instrument and doesn't replace one. It runs your dossier and works alongside any kwaliteitsborger and instrument you already use.

team.title: A Dutch team, reachable
team.body: Built in the Netherlands by the team behind BimDossier. During the pilot you reach us directly — no ticket queue.

items.q: What does "private pilot" mean for me?
items.a: We onboard a small group of Dutch aannemers by hand. You get early access, a direct line to the team, and a say in what we build next — in exchange for real-world feedback.

items.q: Where does my data live, and is there a DPA?
items.a: Everything runs on EU infrastructure and never leaves it. We sign a verwerkersovereenkomst (DPA) with every pilot partner — read our DPA for the details.

items.q: Do I need BIM models, or do PDF floor plans work too?
items.a: Both. Pin findings straight onto a PDF plattegrond when that's all you have, or onto a federated IFC model when you do — the dossier works the same either way.

items.q: Does this replace my kwaliteitsborger or instrument?
items.a: No. BimDossier is not an approved Wkb instrument. It runs your dossier and works alongside any kwaliteitsborger and any instrument you already use.

items.q: Will it fit the tools I already work with?
items.a: Findings import and export over BCF, so issues round-trip with your kwaliteitsborger's tools instead of living in a silo.
Pilot pricing is tailored to your team and projects. Request access and we'll talk it through — starting the conversation commits you to nothing.

brandPanel.eyebrow: Platform for the Wet kwaliteitsborging voor het bouwen (Wkb)

brandPanel.body: Pin findings on your model, track every deadline, and keep the dossier ready for the kwaliteitsborger and bevoegd gezag — built for the Wet kwaliteitsborging voor het bouwen (Wkb).
